return(function(R,Y,M,u,C,v,i,k,B,m,W,s,h,N,d,q,U,o,x,c,E)W,q,c,k,m,x,s,N,h,d,E,B,o,U=function(R,D)local Y=N(D)local M=function()return o(R,{},D,Y)end return M end,function()k=(-326217-(-326218))+k
